zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Goushill於1404年出生在英國德比夏爾時，她的父親Sir Robert Goushill49歲，母親Elizabeth FitzAlan38歲。她於1419年與Sir John FitzLewis MP - Sheriff of Essex and Hertfordshire在英國英格蘭結婚。她去世於1466年在英國素福爾可列黑林加姆享年62歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可列黑林加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Goushill was born in 1404, in Derbyshire, England, her father, Sir Robert Goushill, was 49 and her mother, Elizabeth FitzAlan, was 38. She married Sir John FitzLewis MP - Sheriff of Essex and Hertfordshire in 1419, in England, United Kingdom. She died in 1466, in Letheringham, Suffolk, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Letheringham, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Goushill est née en 1404, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Goushill, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth FitzAlan, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John FitzLewis MP - Sheriff of Essex and Hertfordshire en 1419, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée en 1466, à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

Sie hat 1419 in England, United Kingdom Sir John FitzLewis MP - Sheriff of Essex and Hertfordshire geheiratet. Sie starb 1466 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Letheringham, Suffolk, England und wurde in Letheringham, Suffolk, England begraben.

Lei sposato Sir John FitzLewis MP - Sheriff of Essex and Hertfordshire nel 1419, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1466, nel Letheringham, Suffolk, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Letheringham, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Goushillが1404年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Goushillは49歳，母Elizabeth FitzAlanは38歳であった。1419年にイギリスイギリスでSir John FitzLewis MP - Sheriff of Essex and Hertfordshireと結婚した。彼女は1466年にイギリススフォルクレスエリンガムで62歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクレスエリンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Goushill(이)가 1404년 영국 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Goushill(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth FitzAlan(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1419년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir John FitzLewis MP - Sheriff of Essex and Hertfordshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1466년 영국 수폴크 레더잉함에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 레더잉함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Goushill nasceu em 1404, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Goushill, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth FitzAlan, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John FitzLewis MP - Sheriff of Essex and Hertfordshire em 1419, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 1466, em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Goushill родилась в 1404 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Goushill было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth FitzAlan, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John FitzLewis MP - Sheriff of Essex and Hertfordshire в 1419 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла в 1466 г. в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия.
